evalAfter: (async () => { const r={}; const btn=[...document.querySelectorAll('button,a')].find(el=>/Entrar a MOS/i.test(el.textContent||'')); if(btn)btn.click(); await new Promise(res=>setTimeout(res,3000)); r.version=(await fetch('version.json?b='+Date.now()).then(x=>x.json()).catch(()=>({}))).version; try{MOS.nav('catalogo');}catch(e){} await new Promise(res=>setTimeout(res,4500)); MOS.abrirMembreteCard('IDPRO0001145'); await new Promise(res=>setTimeout(res,2500)); const ov=document.getElementById('msMenuOverlay'); r.abierto=!!ov; r.nOpts=(ov?.querySelectorAll('.ms-opt3')||[]).length; r.svgIconos=(ov?.querySelectorAll('.ms-opt3 > span svg')||[]).length; r.previews=(ov?.querySelectorAll('.adhesivo-etiqueta')||[]).length; r.hero=!!ov?.querySelector('.popt-hero'); r.stepper=(document.getElementById('msAdhQty')||{}).value; return r; })()
